title: MapImages
description: A simple plugin to load images in Minecraft with maps
body:
A simple plugin that allows players to load images using a map

Commands:
```
/getmap <URL>
```
Plugin made by Takkapi, learned from [CodedRed](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC_kPUW3XPrCCRT9a4Pnf1Tg) and modified by [BC5](https://github.com/BC5/)

Please report every bug down below or in Discussion tab

![bStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/MapImages.svg)
